H1_temporal_association_instability.statement: Contamination feature-target association decays or reverses from train to test, causing full-model generalization drop.

H2_weak_signal_dilution.statement: Weak contaminated features compete for model capacity, diluting stable signals.
predictions: permuted contamination produces similar negative effect
full model contamination feature importance is non-zero but generalizes negatively

H3_finite_sample_variance.statement: Added features increase estimation variance; negative harm shrinks with larger training samples.
predictions: negative harm stronger at smaller n

H4_optimization_early_stopping.statement: Full view changes loss trajectory/early-stop timing, leading to worse-generalizing solution.
predictions: strict vs full best-epoch and loss curves differ
fixed-epoch or no-early-stop changes negative harm

H5_retrieval_neighborhood_distortion.statement: Temporal contamination distorts sample distances/candidate neighborhoods, reducing retrieval quality (ModernNCA/TabR only).
predictions: neighborhood quality change correlates with negative harm

H6_regularization_interaction.statement: Regularization hyperparameters interact with contamination, causing underfitting in full view.
predictions: negative harm changes systematically with regularization strength

forbidden: no test labels in model fitting
no intervention definition changed after seeing results
